zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellyn Rolleston於大約1398年出生在英國斯塔福爾洛勒斯頓時，她的父親Thomas de Rolleston29歲，母親Beatrice Hauley16歲。她於大約1416年與Sir Christopher Conyers結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年8月6日在英國越可爾宏比享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellyn Rolleston于大约1398年出生在英国斯塔福爾洛勒斯頓时，她的父亲Thomas de Rolleston29岁，母亲Beatrice Hauley16岁。她于大约1416年与Sir Christopher Conyers结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1444年8月6日在英国越可爾宏比享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rolleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name, in the Midlands from Rolleston (Leics, Notts, Staffs) and perhaps Rowston (Lincs); in ER Yorks from Rolston (or Rowlston) in Mappleton (ER Yorks); and in SW England from Rollestone in Upton Pyne, or Rolstone Barton in Morchard Bishop (both in Devon), or Rollestone (Wilts), and perhaps Rowlestone (Herefs). It is possible that some of the following bearers belong with (2), particularly the Yorks examples.

2 English: relationship name variant of Rollinson , reduced to Rolleson and altered by the addition of an intrusive -t-, as though it were a locative name in -ston. Compare Thomas Rolleson’, 1377 in Poll Tax (Kingston upon Hull, ER Yorks), and Christopher Rollston, 1723, Henry Rowlstone, 1763 in IGI (Kingston upon Hull, ER Yorks).

variants.name: Roulson
meanings: 1 English: chiefly a variant of Rolleston with the common reduction of -ston to -son.
2 English: relationship name occasionally perhaps from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Rolfe + -son, but this appears to have been a rare surname in the medieval period.

variants.name: Roulston
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): variant of   Rolston  .

variants.name: Rolston
meanings: habitational name either from Rolleston (Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire, Staffordshire) and perhaps Rowston (Lincolnshire), Rolston (or Rowlston) in Mappleton (East Yorkshire), or from Rollestone in Upton Pyne, or Rolstone Barton in Morchard Bishop (both in Devon), or Rollestone (Wiltshire), and perhaps Rowlestone (Herefordshire) or Rolstone in Banwell (Somerset). The placenames have various etymological origins, though most are named with the Middle English personal name Rolf or the Old Norse personal name Hrólfr + Middle English toun ‘town, settlement’, Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. See Rolfe .
variant of Rollison , shortened to Rolleson and altered by the addition of an intrusive -t-, as though it were a habitational name in -ston.

nameMeanings.name: Ellyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, possibly from Latin Aemilianus (a derivative of the old Roman family name Aemilius, which is probably from aemulus ‘rival’). Alternatively, it may have a Celtic origin; there are Breton and Irish saints recorded as Aemilianus, which may be a Latinized form of a lost Celtic name.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellyn Rolleston was born about 1398, in Rolleston, Staffordshire, England, her father, Thomas de Rolleston, was 29 and her mother, Beatrice Hauley, was 16. She married Sir Christopher Conyers about 1416. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 6 August 1444, in Hornby, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellyn Rolleston est née environ 1398, à Rolleston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Rolleston, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Hauley, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Christopher Conyers environ 1416. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1444, à Hornby, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellyn Rolleston um 1398 in Rolleston, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Rolleston 29 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Hauley 16. Sie hat um 1416 Sir Christopher Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. August 1444 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Hornby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellyn Rollestonが約1398年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアロレストンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Rollestonは29歳，母Beatrice Hauleyは16歳であった。約1416年にSir Christopher Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1444年8月6日にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールンビーで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellyn Rolleston(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 스태퍼드실르 롤레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Rolleston(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Hauley(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1416년 Sir Christopher Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 8월 6일 영국 요르크실르 호른비에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellyn Rolleston nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Rolleston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Rolleston, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Hauley, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher Conyers aproximadamente 1416. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1444, em Hornby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellyn Rolleston родилась около 1398 г. в местности роллестон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Rolleston было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Hauley, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher Conyers около 1416 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 6 августа 1444 г. в местности хаурнби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.
